title: QOL Craft
description: Pack of Multiple Client side mod's I use that don't break(somehow) and improve your Minecraft experience.
body:
Basic modpack that focuses on QOL, performance and graphic enhancements.

![QOL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04beb893afa95796f0b7b735467ccbfd5fee6760.png)

### Why it's here
I first made this pack while messing with multiple mods. While some worked, others broke and broke badly. But when it started working well, I had a bunch of mods crazily thrown together that work well(kinda).

### Updates
Since I use this pack on a server that doesn't update right when Minecraft updates, the updates will be slow(unless something breaks everything). But if enough people want a certain version I will concider it.
